markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Deepen understanding of Read.ai's customers, product, and market.](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Core Value Prop:** Power users value Read.ai for its meeting note accuracy, robust enterprise controls, and the integrated intelligence of Search Copilot.](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [**Key Differentiator:** Search Copilot is a "bottoms-up Glean," enabling team-level adoption without the high cost and top-down implementation required by competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [**Growth Strategy:** A PLG motion converts individual users to enterprise clients; a user recording 5+ meetings signals high intent and habit formation.](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [**Content Needs:** To accelerate enterprise sales, Read.ai needs competitive comparisons, ROI stories for check-signers, and specific use-case content (e.g., recruiter, onboarding).](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)

## Topics

### Customer Value & Product Pillars

  - [Power users value Read.ai for three pillars:](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
    1.  [**Accuracy & Robustness:** High-quality transcriptions, action items, and search results.](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
    2.  [**Enterprise Controls:** Comprehensive security, compliance, and sharing controls.](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
    3.  [**Search Copilot:** An enterprise search product connecting meetings, email, and Slack to enable complex actions.](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [**Ada (AI Assistant):** A beta feature built on Search Copilot.](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)
      - [**Functionality:** Acts as a personal AI assistant and digital twin.](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
      - [**Capabilities:** Schedules meetings, answers questions on a user's behalf, and drafts replies.](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
      - [**Safeguard:** Requires user approval before sending any communication.](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)

### Competitive Positioning

  - [**Glean:** Read.ai is a "bottoms-up Glean."](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
      - [**Read.ai:** Team-level adoption; respects existing user permissions (e.g., Google Drive access).](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
      - [**Glean:** Top-down, high-cost implementation with complex permissioning.](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [**Built-in Tools (Teams, Gemini):** Read.ai wins by connecting disparate systems (e.g., Zoom + Google + Notion), a capability built-in tools lack.](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
  - [**Niche Competitors (Fathom, Otter.ai):** Read.ai competes on price and wins with the more robust Search Copilot.](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
  - [**Omni-Channel Advantage:** A desktop app launches next week, completing a full suite of apps (desktop, mobile, web) that no competitor currently offers.](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)

### Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) & Use Cases

  - [**Primary ICP:** Frontline teams with high meeting volume.](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
      - [Sales, Customer Success](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
      - [Project/Program Managers, Product Teams](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
      - [Recruiting/HR](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [**Industries:** SaaS, construction, manufacturing.](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)
      - [**Wealth Management:** A target, but adoption is slow due to strict regulations and custom CRM needs.](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
  - [**Key Use Cases:**](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
      - [Onboarding new hires (e.g., getting a salesperson productive in a week).](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
      - [Project management across complex requirements.](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=1614.0)
  - [**Product Gap:** Lacks custom note templates, a key feature for industries like wealth management.](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)

### Growth Strategy & Content Needs

  - [**PLG Motion:** Individual users convert to enterprise clients.](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
      - [**Conversion Signals:**](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
          - [**Note Sharing:** High velocity of automatic note sharing within a company.](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
          - [**Meeting Volume:** A user recording 5+ meetings signals high intent and habit formation.](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
  - [**Content Priorities:** To accelerate enterprise sales, content must address specific needs:](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
      - [**Competitive Comparisons:** Pros/cons vs. alternatives.](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
      - [**ROI Stories:** For check-signers who need a business case.](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
      - [**Use-Case Content:** Specific examples (e.g., "a day in the life of a recruiter").](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
      - [**Industry-Specific Content:** Manufacturing, construction, onboarding.](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kate Reinmiller:** Share case studies, testimonials, and customer call summaries with Erik.](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
  - [**Erik O'Brien:** Continue engaging Yusef (growthx.ai's IT decision-maker) to evaluate Read.ai as a Fathom replacement.](https://fathom.video/share/DKWT5hrNT6Q7_d8tznKhN4uVKCQ7iygc?tab=summary&timestamp=1790.0)
